supersedes.reason: Revalidate the additive bounded-recovery implementation and conservative base-install token fallback under 1.0.60 without relabeling or rewriting the immutable 1.0.59 holdout.

recovery_resilience.latency_policy: Report per-system p50 and p95 store/retrieve latency descriptively; correctness gates cannot be traded for speed.
recovery_resilience.development_policy: Development results may guide implementation and remain visible but cannot support a public leadership claim.
recovery_resilience.holdout_policy: Run once after implementation. This revalidation can establish current implementation integrity but cannot convert a tie into a leadership claim.
